cards.title: Pages need to answer questions
cards.body: The hotel page should answer who it is for, where it is, what guests can book, and what the next step is.

cards.title: Discovery still needs conversion
cards.body: If a traveler finds the hotel through an answer, the booking path should open the matching room, package, event, or inquiry.

items.question: What is AI discovery for hotels?
items.answer: It is the way travelers find, compare, and choose hotels through answer engines and conversational planning assistants.

items.question: What content matters most?
items.answer: Property pages, room pages, offer pages, location guides, policy pages, and Partner storefronts matter most.

items.question: Where should I read more?
items.answer: Read AI discovery for hotels and hotel content for answer engines.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.

faqQuestions: What is AI discovery for hotels?
